review_title: Commendable tool for SEO
description: As a content writer, I tried several SEO tools like SEMrush to do keyword research for my website and for my clients. But I switched to Moz pro when I realized it offers many SEO features like site crawl, link building, and competitors’ analysis. And the good thing is, it offers technical SEO training for those with little understanding of technical SEO. I used it to crawl my site and realized the issues affecting my website. I was able to improve the site performance and my rankings exploded in real-time.
author: Alfred O.
pros: The tool helps in the keyword research process, SEO audit, and competitors’ analysis for keyword ideas and more opportunities for link-building outreach.
cons: I enjoyed all the features of this software. And because my understanding of technical SEO was little; I was overwhelmed with the kind of data is pulled. To understand the whole thing, you need to go for technical SEO training on their resource section.

review_title: The Only Part of Moz that is Better than SEMrush
description: Not very good in Canada (as of late 2021). We very quickly removed that portion of our subscription.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Great data, helpful notifications, easy to assign tasks.
cons: Data was poor or non-existent for Canada (as of late 2021).

review_title: Easy to use for keyword traffic
description: I have realized that this software is very useful for us.. because We can to search keyword traffic easily..
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It's help me to search keyword traffic easily.Get insights to help for attract quality links..
cons: The keyword planner have bit limit compare to other tools..
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Ideal tool for keyword research and PPC campaign planning
author: Muneeb K.
pros: Moz Local has helped me boost the ranking of local listings for my client. It helps me track position changes and target high-impact search queries.
cons: Moz local provides a good service but it can be very expensive if you're not using it for a bundle of clients.

review_title: Useful tool for local seo
description: Moz Local is great for local SEO but no better than SEMrush. I preferred SEMrush for keyword research, rank tracking etc, therefore its all under one roof. If you are focused on helping just local clients, Moz Local is a decent tool to use and also affordable.
author: Joseph D.
pros: I found Moz Local useful for adding clients to local listings. I certainly works best for organizations in the US, UK and Canada. In terms of getting NAPs consistent throughout the web, this is a decent tool to use.
cons: As I said it works best for business listings in US, UK and Canada. Outside of these countries, not so much. This is available in SEMrush also and rather than using a lot of tools, I just use SEMrush to save time.

review_title: Moz local - a good alternative to try for citations
author: Nadin T.
pros: After trying other citation options, we tried Moz Local to add the business to different local directories.
cons: It's a subscription model. Not sure why there is an annual charge for a one-time directory submission? Alternative options have a one-off charge.

review_title: Moz Local For Citation Building
description: My experience with Moz local is middle of the road. I don't mind using it but they really need to work on a better layout. It just seems outdated. I've seen way better dashboards for SEO tools.
author: Ricardo S.
pros: I'ver been trusting the Moz brand now for over 7 years. I find their products and Whiteboard Fridays with Ran to be very useful when conducting keyword research and doing local citation building. I am a current ongoing customer of Moz Local and use it to help boost citations and local listings for my clients. In the past year they recently made changes to their dashboard and how you upload your business information. The portal used to be very confusing and had minimal field to fill out and submit. What I like now about moz local is being able to track my clients local SEO score and find NAP inconsistencies across well known aggregators and other trusted listing sites. They now have better options to upload images, content and reporting tools within ML to help track their progress.
cons: What I do not like about ML is the layout and how you upload data and business information. I find Yext local white label for agencies with a big budget to be much better than ML however since MOZ focuses more on SEO and is known in the industry to be a good source of content, I stick to Moz local to help boost my local citations for my clients.

review_title: A good platform for the price.
description: It has been good. Nothing to write home about but good none the less.
author: James P.
pros: The citation builder is the most important feature for me.
cons: Lack of understanding of what you are signing up for. We have a different amount of citations for each location and if you put you don't serve people at your location expect 10-16 citations for the money you paid.

review_title: Moz Local is one of the most popular local SEO tools on the market.
description: Overall, Moz Local is a great tool for businesses that want to improve their local SEO listings. The software is easy to use and has a variety of features that can help businesses improve their online visibility.
author: Mohammad A.
pros: Moz Local is a powerful tool that can help businesses improve their local SEO listings. The software is easy to use and has a variety of features that can help businesses improve their online visibility. One of the best features of Moz Local is its ability to track and monitor your listing progress. The software will track your listing progress and provide you with reports so you can see how your listing is performing. Another great feature of Moz Local is its ability to help you manage your business information. The software can help you update your business information and ensure that it is accurate across all of your listings.
cons: There is no such thing as a Moz Local Tool. But I think they can offer more flexible pricing packages.

review_title: Value for money
author: Victoria M.
pros: First of all, the dashboard is quite easy to use and you get weekly reports, which is quite beneficial for tracking purposes. When we were first starting out with this product, we faced a few problems and the customer team was there to help all the way. In fact, all our queries were responded to almost immediately, and they always followed up afterward. When setting up, you will be required to answer a few questions. That way, getting started is very easy and as mentioned earlier, the dashboard is user-friendly. As a result, it’s easy to understand everything. As soon as the installation has been completed, you won't have to do anything else except watch for status updates.
cons: Although installation is easy, it may take some time to get started. This is because some of the network updates may take literally forever before completion, and some never get updated at all.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Give Moz Local A Try
author: Joe W.
pros: I love how much time I save by using this instead of trying to work on these business listings manually!
cons: The only con I have is that the cost is pretty high. But still better than the cost of doing the work yourself.

review_title: Great free tool
description: Love this free tool! Has made a huge difference for my parenting blog.
author: Flossie M.
pros: Although you need a paid plan to really maximize using the Moz SEO tools, I have figured out how to maximize the data I can glean on ranking keywords just using the free tool, and that data has had a measurable positive impact on post performance/traffic/ranking keywords on my site over time.
cons: Until you figure out how to configure the different options for what segment of your ranking keywords you're looking at, being limited to only 50 in a given category (esp. now that 2 solid years of using Moz has brought my number of ranking keywords from barely 500 to over 3x as many as that) is frustrating. But there are ways to mitigate for this.

review_title: Very useful app to manage local SEO
description: I am really happy with the Moz Local app that has helped me to manage local SEO projects for my clients.
author: Miloni S.
pros: Really amazing app to audit and optimize local SEO of businesses. The intuitive dashboard is really helpful that provides complete updates on listing on various social media apps and listings.
cons: Sometimes, the review sentiment recognition may fail in case of languages other than english. I really want the team to work upon it.

review_title: Effective and efficient tool for your online business
author: Lauren A.
pros: We have used their premium package and greatly benefited from their local SEO tools, including local listings management. The listings alerts are super useful when getting notified about any edits to our local listings. We've also taken advantage of their reputation management tool to improve how the business is viewed online. Overall, we have gotten positive results using Moz Local.
cons: Would be beneficial if we'd be able to respond to reviews directly from the dashboard.

review_title: Moz local reveiw
author: Wangnin Z.
pros: It is a software that helps a lot in the process of keyword research. With useful notifications, it is easy to set up projects.
cons: For me, the only problem is the registration process, which is not very easy to understand.

review_title: For data management in the business, this tool is good
author: MD Rafiul I.
pros: Moz has a great dashboard that is very easy to use. Each week, the dashboard will show you the results of the networks it's monitoring. This allows you to quickly see if there are any changes or problems. The dashboard is also very helpful because it makes it easier to understand complex information. By displaying results in a visual way, it eliminates the need for deep reading and understanding. It'll ask you a few questions during setup, which makes getting started incredibly simple. The dashboard takes care of the rest once you provide the information.
cons: When we turned on Google Sync, there was a problem with Moz Local, which was really annoying. Nevertheless, by discussing the problem with their support team, we were able to get it resolved.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Makes local citation management easy
author: Khushbu P.
pros: Moz local is really easy to use and manage the local citations for a proper NAP format. The tool also offers an intuitive interface for the local rank tracking and review tracking Its integration with Facebook and other paltforms is truly seamless
cons: The notification function malfunctions in some of the cases.

review_title: best Moz review
author: Carlos Y.
pros: The software is very easy to use with user friendly and understandable interface. It allows better monitoring of data for its referencing
cons: I have not encountered any problems with this software, I highly recommend

review_title: Great Mid-Tier Product
author: Ariane G.
pros: Moz Local lets you update business details throughout the year and pushes that information out to local data aggregators, making a website URL or business hour change pretty easy to roll out.
cons: They are pretty limited in their range of available directories to choose from.

review_title: Fantastic platform for business listings management
author: Samantha J.
pros: When our company changed addresses, we used Moz Local. We've set up the dashboard and indicated that we changed addresses in the listings update tool. Moz Local saved us a lot of time by auto-updating all of our old listings quickly.
cons: Steep learning curve for a beginner but once you get a hang of it, it will become easier to use.

review_title: Moz local
author: Cedric K.
pros: This software helps to easily navigate and set up projects to get started
cons: The disadvantage is the lack of understanding when you register which is a real pain

review_title: A great way to manage your local listings
description: All in all a very solid tool overall which could definitely be priced better.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The sync feature for your listings is a real-time saver. Review management in one dashboard and generation of charts and scores for most of the things make it really easy to go about managing stuff
cons: In terms of pricing, it is a little on the higher side so no the best option if you are just getting started. The UI/UX of the platform is something I would like to see some improvement on but I totally understand that design can be subjective so maybe it's just me.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Not the software for me
author: Tom W.
pros: easy to navigate and easy to set up projects to get going
cons: I feel this lacked a lot of features compared to SEMRush and also limits to projects and scans, which i was constantly hitting
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great platform for listings management and SEO
author: Jane W.
pros: I do in house marketing and create SEO strategies for the company I work for. Overall, Moz Local is my effective and efficient solution content marketing, link analysis, and SEO. The features I find the most valuable include: On-page SEO audit & recommendations Keyword research tool Moz toolbar Backlink analysis Competitive analysis Business listings management
cons: Some keyword volume inconsistencies with other comparable tools and some business listings take months to update.

review_title: Real good, but pricey to get the full potential
description: I'm currently using both Moz and SEMrush, but I got to say, Moz has a big lead with features like site crawling, link building, etc. You can really improve your overall SEO with this software!
author: Antoine S.
pros: It helped us analyze the most important keywords for our industry. You can really get the long-tail keywords and take advantage of them.
cons: The software can get expensive when you have many locations like our company, which sell products in North America.
